title: micromeria canariensis
intro: Micromeria canariensis, also known as Canary Island pennyroyal, is a perennial plant species native to the Canary Islands. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a carminative, which helps to alleviate digestive issues such as nausea, bloating, and gas. The health benefits of Micromeria canariensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are often used to treat various health issues, including menstrual cramps, headaches, and skin conditions.
